description: Product Description 8 SHOT RING CAPS FOR GUN TOY The 8-Shot Cap Ring is an essential accessory for toy gun enthusiasts, especially those who enjoy the excitement of simulating real gunfire with cap guns. This accessory is designed to be used with compatible toy guns and offers an authentic and thrilling shooting experience for kids and adults alike. CRAFTED FROM SAFE MATERIALS It's made from safe, non-toxic ingredients and will not stick to your hands. All our products are tested to the best standard to ensure the safety of your children. EASY TO LOAD The feature of easy loading is certainly convenient for both children and parents. Simplifying the process of loading the caps into the toy gun makes it more user-friendly and enhances the overall play experience. Making it simple to load the cap rings into the designated chamber of the toy gun enhances the overall play experience for children. It reduces frustration and allows children to quickly reload and continue playing, promoting uninterrupted fun and imaginative playtime. Parents and caregivers should ensure that children understand the difference between toy guns and real firearms and emphasize responsible play at all times. Classic toy cap guns have been entertaining children for generations. Caps are loaded with shock-sensitive explosive compounds (about 2mm in diameter) that provide noise and smoke.
